text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Umarathon runner registration staff"... Ah, looks
like it would overlap with practice time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Production line at a carrot plant"... "Cleat quality
inspection"... Hmm, wouldn't want stiff shoulders
with a race coming up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! "Short-Term OK! Delivering Packages and
Smiles: UmaExpress, Temporary Courier." This is
it! It'll even double as training—two birds with one
stone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I might even be able to afford a trip
to the amusement park as next month's treat for
my sisters! ♪ Big sister's got work to do!
